content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:IndustrialLightAndMagic.png|thumb|200px|[[Industrial Light & Magic]] is established.]]

A list of events related to ''Star Wars'' in '''1975'''.

==January==
*[[January 3|3]] – [[Jason Marsden]] is born.
*[[January 28|28]] – ''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'' is completed.

==February==
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Simon Emanuel]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 2|2]] – [[Giuseppe Camuncoli]] is born.
*[[March 6|6]] – [[Gerald Parel]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 2|2]] – [[Pedro Pascal]] is born.
*[[April 6|6]] – [[Zach Braff]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 1|1]] – [[Gareth Edwards]] is born.
*[[June 11|11]] – [[John Tui]] is born.

==July==
*[[Industrial Light & Magic]] is established.
*[[July 12|12]] – [[Phil Lord]] is born.
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Kaare Andrews]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 1|1]] – ''[[The Star Wars: From The Adventures of Luke Starkiller]]'' completed
*[[August 11|11]] – [[Roger Craig Smith]] is born.
*[[August 16|16]] – [[Taika Waititi]] is born.
*[[August 28|28]] – [[Eugene Byrd]] is born.
*28 – [[Jade Raymond]] is born.
*[[August 29|29]] – [[Dante Basco]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 18|18]] – [[Jason Sudeikis]] is born.
*[[September 21|21]] – [[Dominic Pace]] is born.
*[[September 23|23]] – [[Christopher Miller]] is born.
*[[September 29|29]] – [[Steve Yedlin]] is born.
*[[September 30|30]] – [[Kieron Gillen]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 3|3]] – [[Greig Fraser]] is born.
*[[October 5|5]] – [[Chris Wyatt]] is born.
*[[October 16|16]] – [[Nelson Lee]] is born.
*[[October 20|20]] – [[Sunil Malhotra]] is born.
*[[October 30|30]] – [[Carla Tassara]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Ryan Odagawa]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 4|4]] – [[Frederik Budolph-Larsen]] is born.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Chip Zdarsky]] is born.
*[[December 25|25]] – [[Daxiong]] is born.
*?? – [[January LaVoy]] is born.

==Unknown month==
*[[Jeffrey Brown]] is born.
*[[Marco Checchetto]] is born.
*[[Robin Pronovost]] is born.
*[[Dion Williams]] is born.

----

{{Years-RealWorld}}
